HeroSection.description: AI-powered recipe suggestions based on what's already in your kitchen. No more food waste, just delicious possibilities.

Footer.tagline: Empowering home cooks with smart insights and personalized cooking journeys.

layout.privacyNote: Your data is private and only used to improve your experience.
layout.imageAlt: Chef preparing food in the kitchen
layout.heroBadge: Smart ingredient analysis and tailored cooking
layout.heroDescription: AI-powered meal analysis, personalized plans and recipes that truly fit your taste and your tools.
layout.topCardTitle: Fresh vegetables and smart recipe suggestions

login.title: Login to your account
login.description: Sign in to continue your AI cooking experience.
login.fallbackError: Unable to complete login right now.

register.googleConnectedNotice: Google account connected. Finish the remaining steps to create your account.
register.googleMissingToken: Google verification expired. Start again from step one.
register.privacyCaption: Your data stays protected and is only used to personalize your experience.
register.fallbackError: Unable to complete registration right now.

step1.title: Create your account
step1.description: Start your smart cooking journey with your basic account details.

step2.title: Tell us your food preferences
step2.description: We use these preferences to tailor recipes and meal recommendations.

step3.title: Build your cooking profile
step3.description: Help the AI understand your cooking level, household setup and kitchen tools.

dietary.title: Dietary preferences
dietary.description: Choose the styles or restrictions that matter most to you.

cuisines.title: Favorite cuisines
cuisines.description: Pick the cuisines you want Akalat to prioritize.

allergies.title: Allergies
allergies.description: Add any ingredients you want us to avoid.

family.title: Household type
family.description: This helps us suggest the right portions and meal types.

level.title: Cooking level
level.description: Choose the level that best matches your current confidence in the kitchen.

tools.title: Available kitchen tools
tools.description: Select the tools you already have so recipes stay realistic.
tools.otherDescription: Add any extra tools that are not in the main list.

goals.title: Primary cooking goal
goals.description: What matters most to you right now?

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll start the password reset flow.
forgotPassword.fallbackError: Unable to start the reset flow right now.

otp.verifyEmailDescription: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to finish creating your account.
otp.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter the 6-digit code to continue resetting your password.
otp.fallbackError: Unable to verify the code right now.

resetPassword.title: Reset your password
resetPassword.description: Choose a strong new password for your account.
resetPassword.missingToken: Reset token is missing. Start the flow again.
resetPassword.fallbackError: Unable to reset the password right now.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.
validation.passwordUpper: Password must include at least one uppercase letter.
validation.passwordNumber: Password must include at least one number.
validation.passwordSpecial: Password must include at least one special character.
validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 3 characters.
validation.dietaryRequired: Select at least one dietary preference.
validation.cuisineRequired: Select at least one favorite cuisine.
validation.allergiesMax: You can add up to 10 allergies only.
validation.toolsRequired: Select at least one kitchen tool.
validation.otherToolsMax: You can add up to 10 extra tools only.
validation.otpLength: The verification code must be 6 digits.
validation.otpDigits: The verification code must contain numbers only.

ThreeStepsSection.subtitle: We've simplified the journey from a stocked fridge to a gourmet dish.

scan.title: Scan Ingredients
scan.description: Simply snap a photo of your fridge or pantry, our AI identifies everything in seconds.

ai.title: AI Suggests Recipes
ai.description: Get personalized recipe matches based on what you have and your dietary goals.

cook.title: Cook with Guidance
cook.description: Follow beautiful, interactive instructions with voice commands for a stress-free cooking experience.

alternatives.title: Smart Alternatives
alternatives.description: Missing something? Our AI suggests the best alternatives based on recipe chemistry and ingredients instantly.

scanner.title: Ingredients Scanner
scanner.description: Computer vision that recognizes over 2,000 types of ingredients instantly.

voice.title: Voice Guidance
voice.description: Keep your hands clean, control the app and read steps using only your voice.

shopping.title: Smart Shopping List
shopping.description: Intelligently grouped by store aisles to help you finish shopping faster.

nutrition.title: Nutritional Information
nutrition.description: Automatic calculation of macros and detection of allergens for every meal.
